steps.comment: Ensure that the admin account is a Moodle site administrator.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $CFG, $DB; $admin = $DB->get_record('user', ['username' => 'admin', 'deleted' => 0], '*', MUST_EXIST); $current = get_config(null, 'siteadmins'); $adminids = []; if ($current !== false && trim((string)$current) !== '') { foreach (explode(',', (string)$current) as $id) { $id = (int)trim($id); if ($id > 0) { $adminids[$id] = $id; } } } unset($adminids[(int)$admin->id]); $adminids = array_merge([(int)$admin->id], array_values($adminids)); $siteadmins = implode(',', $adminids); set_config('siteadmins', $siteadmins); $CFG->siteadmins = $siteadmins; purge_all_caches(); if (!is_siteadmin($admin->id)) { throw new moodle_exception('The admin user could not be registered as a site administrator.'); } mtrace('Site administrator verified: admin, user ID ' . $admin->id . '. siteadmins=' . $siteadmins);

steps.comment: Install and verify the Spanish language pack from the uploaded ZIP.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $CFG, $DB; $zippath = '/tmp/es.zip'; if (!is_file($zippath) || filesize($zippath) < 1000) { throw new moodle_exception('Spanish language ZIP is missing or empty: ' . $zippath); } $langroot = $CFG->dataroot . '/lang'; if (!is_dir($langroot) && !mkdir($langroot, 0777, true)) { throw new moodle_exception('Cannot create Moodle language directory: ' . $langroot); } $zip = new ZipArchive(); $result = $zip->open($zippath); if ($result !== true) { throw new moodle_exception('Cannot open Spanish language ZIP. ZipArchive code: ' . $result); } $hasesroot = false; for ($i = 0; $i < $zip->numFiles; $i++) { $entry = str_replace('\\', '/', $zip->getNameIndex($i)); if ($entry === 'es/' || strpos($entry, 'es/') === 0) { $hasesroot = true; break; } } $destination = $hasesroot ? $langroot : $langroot . '/es'; if (!is_dir($destination) && !mkdir($destination, 0777, true)) { $zip->close(); throw new moodle_exception('Cannot create Spanish language destination: ' . $destination); } if (!$zip->extractTo($destination)) { $zip->close(); throw new moodle_exception('Could not extract Spanish language pack to: ' . $destination); } $zip->close(); $langconfig = $langroot . '/es/langconfig.php'; if (!is_file($langconfig)) { throw new moodle_exception('Spanish language pack was extracted but langconfig.php was not found at: ' . $langconfig); } set_config('lang', 'es'); set_config('country', 'ES'); set_config('timezone', 'Europe/Madrid'); $CFG->lang = 'es'; $DB->execute("UPDATE {user} SET lang = ? WHERE deleted = 0", ['es']); get_string_manager()->reset_caches(); purge_all_caches(); mtrace('Spanish language pack installed and verified: ' . $langconfig);

steps.comment: Import Adaptable theme configuration exported as JSON, including File API assets.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } require_once('/tmp/adaptable-theme/apply-adaptable-config.php'); theme_adaptable_playground_import('/tmp/adaptable-theme/adaptable-config.json');

steps.comment: Register Adaptable logo in Moodle File API.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $CFG; $logo = '/tmp/adaptable-theme/Mec_Nuevo_logo.jpg'; if (!is_file($logo)) { throw new moodle_exception('Logo file not found: ' . $logo); } $context = context_system::instance(); $fs = get_file_storage(); $component = 'theme_adaptable'; $filearea = 'logo'; $filename = 'Mec_Nuevo_logo.jpg'; $fs->delete_area_files($context->id, $component, $filearea, 0); $filerecord = ['contextid' => $context->id, 'component' => $component, 'filearea' => $filearea, 'itemid' => 0, 'filepath' => '/', 'filename' => $filename]; $fs->create_file_from_pathname($filerecord, $logo); set_config('logo', '/' . $filename, 'theme_adaptable'); purge_all_caches();

steps.comment: Import custom Moodle roles from XML presets.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } require_once('/tmp/role-presets/apply-role-presets.php'); playground_import_role_presets(['/tmp/role-presets/student_vercursosocultos.xml', '/tmp/role-presets/tutor.xml', '/tmp/role-presets/coordinacion.xml', '/tmp/role-presets/autor.xml']);

steps.comment: Import Moodle standard grade scales from JSON.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } require_once('/tmp/scale-import/apply-scales.php'); playground_import_standard_scales('/tmp/scale-import/moodle-standard-scales.json');

steps.comment: Restore Curso Pensar into the existing PRUEBAS category.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $CFG, $DB, $USER; require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/backup/util/includes/restore_includes.php'); require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/course/lib.php'); $backupfile = '/tmp/copia_curso_pensar.mbz'; if (!is_file($backupfile) || filesize($backupfile) < 1000) { throw new moodle_exception('Course backup is missing or empty: ' . $backupfile); } $category = $DB->get_record('course_categories', ['name' => 'PRUEBAS'], '*', MUST_EXIST); $admin = get_admin(); if (!$admin) { throw new moodle_exception('Administrator account could not be found.'); } $USER = $admin; $backupdir = restore_controller::get_tempdir_name(SITEID, $admin->id); $path = make_backup_temp_directory($backupdir); $packer = get_file_packer('application/vnd.moodle.backup'); if (!$packer->extract_to_pathname($backupfile, $path)) { fulldelete($path); throw new moodle_exception('Could not extract Moodle backup: ' . $backupfile); } if (!is_file($path . '/moodle_backup.xml')) { fulldelete($path); throw new moodle_exception('The MBZ does not contain moodle_backup.xml.'); } $tmprc = new restore_controller($backupdir, SITEID, backup::INTERACTIVE_NO, backup::MODE_GENERAL, $admin->id, backup::TARGET_EXISTING_ADDING); $backuptype = $tmprc->get_type(); $tmprc->destroy(); if ($backuptype !== backup::TYPE_1COURSE) { fulldelete($path); throw new moodle_exception('The supplied MBZ is not a complete course backup.'); } list($tempfullname, $tempshortname) = restore_dbops::calculate_course_names(0, 'Curso Pensar', 'PENSAR'); $courseid = restore_dbops::create_new_course($tempfullname, $tempshortname, $category->id); $rc = new restore_controller($backupdir, $courseid, backup::INTERACTIVE_NO, backup::MODE_GENERAL, $admin->id, backup::TARGET_NEW_COURSE); try { $rc->execute_precheck(); $rc->execute_plan(); } catch (Throwable $e) { $rc->destroy(); fulldelete($path); throw new moodle_exception('Course restoration failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); } $rc->destroy(); $course = $DB->get_record('course', ['id' => $courseid], '*', MUST_EXIST); $course->fullname = 'Curso Pensar'; $course->shortname = 'PENSAR'; $course->category = $category->id; $course->visible = 1; update_course($course); rebuild_course_cache($courseid, true); fulldelete($path); purge_all_caches(); mtrace('Course restored successfully into PRUEBAS. Course ID: ' . $courseid . ', shortname: PENSAR');

steps.fullname: Curso de Prueba · ejemplo de uso
steps.summary: Curso demo con una actividad mod_exelearning y un alumno matriculado.

steps.comment: Set curso de Pruebas con formato Tiles.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $DB, $CFG; require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/course/lib.php'); $course = $DB->get_record('course', ['shortname' => 'Pruebas'], '*', MUST_EXIST); $course->format = 'tiles'; update_course($course); rebuild_course_cache($course->id, true); purge_all_caches();

steps.name: Actividad evaluable (demo)
steps.intro: Cuestionario demo con dos iDevices calificables (trueorfalse + guess).

steps.comment: addModule skips exelearning_add_instance; force extract + grade sync (view.php self-heal). runPhpCode = raw PHP CLI, so require config.php first.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $DB, $CFG; require_once($CFG->dirroot.'/mod/exelearning/lib.php'); $fs = get_file_storage(); foreach ($DB->get_records('exelearning') as $exe) { $cm = get_coursemodule_from_instance('exelearning', $exe->id); if (!$cm) { continue; } $ctx = context_module::instance($cm->id); if (exelearning_get_stored_package($ctx->id) === null) { continue; } if (!$fs->get_file($ctx->id, 'mod_exelearning', 'content', (int)$exe->revision, '/', 'index.html')) { exelearning_extract_stored_package($ctx->id, (int)$exe->revision); } if (!$DB->record_exists_select('exelearning_grade_item', 'exelearningid = ? AND deleted = 0 AND itemnumber > 0', [$exe->id])) { exelearning_sync_grade_items($exe->id, $ctx->id); } }

steps.name: Actividad SCORM evaluable (demo)
steps.intro: Paquete SCORM 1.2 de ejemplo exportado desde eXeLearning.

steps.comment: addModule leaves SCORM without scoes (scorm_get_toc crashes); repoint reference + scorm_parse(). runPhpCode = raw PHP CLI, so require config.php first.
steps.code: define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $c) { if (is_file($c)) { require($c); break; } } global $DB, $CFG; require_once($CFG->dirroot.'/mod/scorm/lib.php'); require_once($CFG->dirroot.'/mod/scorm/locallib.php'); $fs = get_file_storage(); foreach ($DB->get_records('scorm', ['scormtype' => 'local']) as $scorm) { if ($DB->record_exists('scorm_scoes', ['scorm' => $scorm->id])) { continue; } $cm = get_coursemodule_from_instance('scorm', $scorm->id); if (!$cm) { continue; } $ctx = context_module::instance($cm->id); $files = $fs->get_area_files($ctx->id, 'mod_scorm', 'package', 0, 'sortorder, itemid, filepath, filename', false); $pkg = reset($files); if (!$pkg) { continue; } if ($scorm->reference !== $pkg->get_filename()) { $DB->set_field('scorm', 'reference', $pkg->get_filename(), ['id' => $scorm->id]); $scorm = $DB->get_record('scorm', ['id' => $scorm->id]); } scorm_parse($scorm, true); }

steps.name: Actividad H5P evaluable (demo)
steps.intro: Conjunto de preguntas H5P de ejemplo.

steps.comment: Configure the Moodle site front page with search, course list and enrolled courses.
steps.code:
define('CLI_SCRIPT', true); $configfile = null; foreach (['/www/moodle/config.php', getcwd().'/config.php', '/var/www/html/config.php'] as $candidate) { if (is_file($candidate)) { $configfile = $candidate; require($candidate); break; } } global $CFG, $DB, $SITE, $COURSE; require_once($CFG->dirroot . '/course/lib.php'); if (!$configfile) { throw new moodle_exception('Moodle config.php could not be located.'); } $source = file_get_contents($configfile); if ($source === false) { throw new moodle_exception('Moodle config.php could not be read: ' . $configfile); } $patterns = ['/^\s*\$CFG->frontpage\s*=\s*.*?;\s*$/m', '/^\s*\$CFG->frontpageloggedin\s*=\s*.*?;\s*$/m']; $clean = preg_replace($patterns, '', $source); if ($clean === null) { throw new moodle_exception('Could not process frontpage overrides in config.php.'); } if ($clean !== $source) { if (!is_writable($configfile)) { throw new moodle_exception('config.php contains frontpage overrides but is not writable: ' . $configfile); } if (file_put_contents($configfile, $clean) === false) { throw new moodle_exception('Could not remove frontpage overrides from config.php.'); } } unset($CFG->frontpage, $CFG->frontpageloggedin); if (isset($CFG->config_php_settings) && is_array($CFG->config_php_settings)) { unset($CFG->config_php_settings['frontpage'], $CFG->config_php_settings['frontpageloggedin']); } $site = $DB->get_record('course', ['id' => SITEID], '*', MUST_EXIST); $site->fullname = 'Playground Aula Virtual'; $site->shortname = 'Playground_AV'; $site->summary = '

Entorno Moodle de pruebas con cursos y configuración personalizada.

'; $site->summaryformat = FORMAT_HTML; $site->timemodified = time(); $DB->update_record('course', $site); set_config('frontpage', FRONTPAGECOURSESEARCH . ',' . FRONTPAGEALLCOURSELIST); set_config('frontpageloggedin', FRONTPAGEENROLLEDCOURSELIST . ',' . FRONTPAGECOURSESEARCH . ',' . FRONTPAGEALLCOURSELIST); $SITE = $DB->get_record('course', ['id' => SITEID], '*', MUST_EXIST); if (isset($COURSE) && (int)$COURSE->id === SITEID) { $COURSE = $SITE; } core_courseformat\base::reset_course_cache(SITEID); purge_all_caches(); mtrace('Site front page configured successfully.');
